summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin RBAC features completed successfully. All 16 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including admin access, non-admin redirect, role toggle, and stats display.

issues: Admin link visible to non-admin users in sidebar (minor UX - redirect works correctly but link shouldn't show for non-admins)

passed_tests: Backend: API Root endpoint (200)
Backend: Health check endpoint (200)
Backend: Admin login returns is_admin=True for admin email
Backend: Non-admin cannot access /api/admin/stats (403)
Backend: Non-admin cannot access /api/admin/users (403)
Backend: Non-admin cannot update user roles (403)
Backend: Admin can grant admin role to other users
Backend: Admin can revoke admin role from users
Backend: Invalid role values rejected (400)
Backend: Admin stats returns all required fields
Backend: Admin stats values are valid integers
Backend: POST /api/compatibility/analyze returns synastry report with AI analysis
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/reports returns user's reports
Backend: Admin users endpoint returns paginated user list with is_admin flag
Backend: Pagination works correctly on admin users
Backend: Admin cannot demote self (400)
Frontend: Admin user (nchobah@gmail.com) can access /admin page
Frontend: Admin Dashboard title and stats cards displayed
Frontend: All 5 stats cards present (Users, Chats, Sessions, Advanced, Compatibility)
Frontend: Stats show correct values (31 Users, 40 Messages, 9 Sessions, 2 Reports)
Frontend: Users table displays with search functionality
Frontend: Search filters users correctly by name/email/sun_sign
Frontend: Admin toggle buttons present for role management
Frontend: Admin role grant/revoke shows success toast
Frontend: Non-admin user correctly redirected from /admin to /dashboard
Frontend: New user registration defaults to Advanced tier
action_items: OPTIONAL: Hide Admin link in sidebar for non-admin users (minor UX improvement)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users during pytest execution for role management testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin RBAC is fully working. Admin email nchobah@gmail.com is set in ADMIN_EMAILS env var. Admin can grant/revoke roles via PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/role?role=admin|user. Frontend AdminRoute component correctly checks user.is_admin and redirects non-admins to /dashboard.
